name: retailUnitRollout
description: Gradually roll out features to specific retail units (country codes like SE, FR, US)

parameters.name: retailUnits
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of retail unit codes (e.g., SE, FR, US)

parameters.name: rollout
parameters.description: Percentage of users within selected retail units to enable the feature for

parameters.name: stickiness
parameters.description: Stickiness for consistent user experience. Possible values: default, userId, sessionId, random

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Used to correlate rollout across multiple feature flags
